experts.title: Experts
experts.subtitle: Reusable worker configuration templates
experts.emptyDescription: Publish a worker as an expert to save its skills, prompt, and knowledge mounts as a reusable template.
experts.deleteConfirmDescription: This removes the configuration template. Running workers are not affected.

publish.title: Publish as expert
publish.description: Save this worker's configuration as a reusable expert template.
publish.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

marketSubmission.title: Publicación en Marketplace
marketSubmission.description: Envía este experto para su revisión en Marketplace y consulta el estado de publicación.
marketSubmission.empty: Este experto aún no se ha enviado a Marketplace.
marketSubmission.snapshotRequired: Publica este experto desde un Worker antes de enviarlo a Marketplace.
marketSubmission.withdrawDescription: Esta versión dejará de estar disponible en Marketplace. Las instalaciones existentes no se verán afectadas.
marketSubmission.withdrawFailed: No se pudo retirar esta publicación. Inténtalo de nuevo.
marketSubmission.dialogDescription: Proporciona la información para clientes que evaluarán los revisores.
marketSubmission.outcomesHint: Introduce un resultado concreto por línea.

marketUpgrade.title: Versión de Marketplace
marketUpgrade.description: Mantén este experto instalado actualizado con su versión publicada en Marketplace.

picker.label: Start from expert
picker.hint: Prefills agent, skills, prompt, and knowledge mounts from the template.

edit.createDescription: Define a reusable worker template with its agent, prompt, and skills.
edit.editDescription: Update this expert template. Running workers are not affected.
edit.agentfileLayerPlaceholder: Raw AgentFile directives appended at launch…
edit.configOverridesInvalid: Config overrides must be a valid JSON object

create.title: New expert
create.subtitle: Configure a reusable worker template backed by its own Git repo.
create.basicsDescription: Name, description, avatar, type, and the underlying agent.
create.avatarHint: PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF up to 2 MB.
create.avatarErrorType: Unsupported image type. Use PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF.
create.avatarErrorSize: Image is too large. Maximum size is 2 MB.
create.avatarErrorRead: Could not read the selected image.
create.agentfileDescription: The AgentFile prompt layer committed as agent.md in the expert's repo.
create.skillsDescription: Bind skills by slug so the expert can use them at run time.
create.knowledgeDescription: Attach knowledge bases the expert can read or write.
